meta.title: Felipe Narváez Gómez — Portfolio
meta.description: Developer and creative designer. Portfolio featuring web projects, design, and audiovisual production.

about.title: About Me
about.intro1: Hi! I'm Felipe Narváez Gómez — passionate about technology and design, with a path that blends artistic creativity with software development.
about.intro2: My professional journey has taken me from music production and graphic design to digital content and building innovative applications.
about.intro3: Today I focus on building technology solutions for companies, where every line of code and every design choice aims to create intuitive, high-impact digital experiences.
about.goals1: I'm aiming to grow in frontend development and UX/UI design, seeking projects that let me innovate and make a positive impact on users.
about.goals2: I want to keep growing in dynamic environments while balancing professional life with hobbies that fuel creativity and wellbeing.

web.title: Web Design & UX/UI
web.body: Modern, intuitive, responsive interfaces that meet functional goals and deliver an outstanding user experience.

social.title: Social Media
social.body: Content strategy and community management to strengthen digital presence and engagement for brands and projects.

automation.title: Automation
automation.body: Workflow automation to reduce repetitive tasks and boost productivity.

work.title: Audiovisual Content Creator
work.body: Conceptualization, filming, and editing of high-quality video for digital platforms.

work.title: Entrepreneur & Freelance Professional
work.body: Developing and managing own projects across several areas:

work.title: Staff — Impact Fest
work.body: Active collaboration in organizing and running Impact Fest, a key entrepreneurship event in Nariño.

academic.title: Vibe Coding Hackathon
academic.body: Hands-on intensive development, applying programming and problem-solving skills in a collaborative, high-pressure environment.

certs.title: Software Engineering Seminar

certs.title: Vibe Coding Hackathon 2025
certs.body: Participation in an intensive development event focused on innovation and teamwork.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.intro: Feedback from clients and colleagues who have worked with me — reflecting commitment to quality and client satisfaction.
testimonials.placeholder1Hint: Share your experience working with me
testimonials.ctaBody: I'd love to hear from you. If you want to share a testimonial, get in touch.

featured.quote: Felipe has strong technical skills across many areas of computing. He has delivered projects in editing, databases, programming, AI, design, music production, brand management, and social advertising. His success comes from fierce determination and extraordinary commitment. He is passionate about what he does and has exceptional social skills.
